allow: PowerShell($headers = @{ Authorization = "token $env:GITHUB_TOKEN" }; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/gurnani/novatech-demo/pulls?state=open" -Headers $headers | Select-Object number, title, @{n='created_at';e={$_.created_at}}, @{n='user';e={$_.user.login}})

PowerShell(Write-Host "Token set: $\($env:GITHUB_TOKEN -ne $null -and $env:GITHUB_TOKEN -ne ''\)"; try { $headers = @{ Authorization = "token $env:GITHUB_TOKEN" }; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/gurnani/novatech-demo/pulls?state=open" -Headers $headers; Write-Host "PR count: $\($response.Count\)"; $response | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "#$\($_.number\) - $\($_.title\)" } } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($headers = @{ Authorization = "token $env:GITHUB_TOKEN" }; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/gurnani/novatech-demo/pulls?state=open" -Headers $headers; Write-Host "Open PRs: $\($response.Count\)"; $response | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "#$\($_.number\) | $\($_.title\) | by $\($_.user.login\) | $\($_.created_at\)" })
